title: FishonMC-Extras
description:
A simple mod to display helpful QOL HUDs on screen.
Fan made for the play.fishonmc.net server.
body:
# Project is archived. Please do not use this version, since it is outdated

FoE (FishonMC-Extras) is a QOL mod for play.fishonmc.net. It has many QOL features that will improve the player experience on the server

## 📋 FEATURES
- Real-time fishing statistics tracking
- Equipped Pet HUD
- Equipment HUD
- Contest HUD
- Quest tracking
- Extra Pet stats
- Many "/foe" chat commands
- Pet merge calculator
- Item Frame tooltip shower
- Inventory buttons
- Crew tracker
- Notifications about wrong armor/pet/bait and more
- Rarity marker on items
- Chat bubbles
- And many more features...


## 🛠️ Configuration
Access config screen via:
1. Mod Menu (`Esc` → `Mods` → `FishonMC-Extras`)
2. `O` Default Key

## 🔴 Incompatibilities
- Labymod
- Lunar Client

**Disclaimer:** Not affilliated with Mojang, Microsoft or the FishOnMC Server. This is a player made mod.

MarkassK
